scripts.build:deps: npm --prefix ../../packages/agent-core run build && npm --prefix ../../packages/host-internal run build:tsc
scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-dev-built.mjs && concurrently -k -n electron,renderer "npm run dev:electron:run" "npm run dev:renderer"
scripts.dev:electron: node scripts/ensure-dev-built.mjs && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:1420 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1420 electron dist-electron/electron/main.js
scripts.dev:web: node scripts/ensure-dev-built.mjs && concurrently -k -n host,renderer "npm run dev:web:host" "npm run dev:web:renderer"
scripts.build:app: npm run build:deps && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: node scripts/materialize-oauth-env.mjs --ensure-for-packaging && npm run build:app && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:dir: node scripts/materialize-oauth-env.mjs --ensure-for-packaging && npm run build:app && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.test:lib: node scripts/check-renderer-host-internal-imports.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types --test test/workspace-tool-tabs.test.mjs test/browser-url.test.mjs test/browser-element-picker.test.mjs test/local-listeners-parse.test.mjs test/lib/conversation-continue-ui.test.mjs test/lib/desktop-mica-surface.test.mjs test/lib/desktop-shell.test.mjs test/hooks/tooltip-switch-registry.test.mjs test/hooks/github-device-login-model.test.mjs test/lib/process-seal-animation.test.mjs test/lib/composer-branch-checkout-gate.test.mjs test/lib/fork-session-truncation.test.mjs test/lib/fork-eligibility.test.mjs && npx --yes tsx --test test/composer-segments.test.mjs test/lib/file-snippet-wire-text.test.mjs
